title: Neon Edge | Module 6: The Nondistribution Constraint
text: Neon Edge | Module 6: The Nondistribution Constraint Goal: Organize/Change -> Viz: Toggle Switches -> Interaction: Dynamic state updates. 2. Flow Visualization -> Goal: Relationship/Compare -> Viz: Chart.js Bar Chart -> Justification: Clearly shows the allocation of surplus. Confirming NO SVG/Mermaid. --> The Nondistribution Constraint Chapter 6: Nonprofits and Alternative Forms 501(c)(3) Protocol ⚖ Statutory HUD The Hansmann Rule A nonprofit is prohibited from distributing its **net earnings**, if any, to individuals who exercise control over it, such as members, officers, or directors. Trust Technology The constraint solves contract failure . Donors trust the firm because they know the "owners" can't pocket the surplus. The Mission Zeeva is donating her 'Slum-Shield' blueprints. Sammy is soliciting donations from High Tower philanthropists. To ensure the credits actually reach the Low Slums, they must legally bar themselves from the profits. I. The Constraint HUD Set the legal parameters for the Uplift Initiative . You must decide how to handle the "Surplus Credits" generated by the organization. Step 1: Select Entity Class For-Profit Corp Nonprofit Corp Step 2: Nondistribution Valve Allow Dividends to Founders? Valve: OPEN (Distributions Allowed) Capital Flow Analysis Inbound: 10,000 Donation Credits Program Services (Blueprints) 5,000 CR Founder Distributions (Profit) 5,000 CR Donor Trust: CRITICAL FAILURE II. Finalize Non-Profit Charter "To solve the problem of ... Scaling Contract Failure (Trust) , the Uplift Initiative must adopt the ... Nondistribution Constraint Dividend Mandate . While the entity may generate a ... Loss Profit (Surplus) , those funds must be retained for ... Zeeva & Sammy The Entity's Mission rather than distributed as dividends." DEPOSIT CHARTER TO LEDGER Acknowledge
